warnings: PATTERN unchanged from t3 (both 'schedule') -- new 2026-07-08 taxonomy explicitly widened 'schedule' to cover door/window/fence summary tables ('ไม่จำกัดแค่ตารางเสา/คานอีกต่อไป ครอบคลุมตารางสรุปทุกชนิด เช่น ตารางประตู หน้าต่าง'), which matches this page exactly.

Independent read done first (own scan of all 7 elevation icons + spec tables), then cross-checked against t3's หน้า10_door_window_schedule.json: identical element set, dimensions, and D/W numbering choice. No content disagreement found. Kept t3's D1-D3/W1-W4 relabeling scheme (raw sheet uses two independently-restarting circle/hex numbering sequences, 1-3 for doors and 1-4 for windows, which would collide if reused verbatim as element_id).
Only wrapper-level change vs t3: added mandatory source_image field, renamed 'element' key to 'elements' (plural, matching t4 convention used elsewhere in this round), added schema_generation.
